description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable box magazine. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving the weapon a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle features standard iron sights, with a front post and rear notch, and a prominent gas tube above the barrel. The wooden elements have a warm, reddish-brown hue, contrasting with the matte black metal components. The magazine is distinctly curved, typical of rifles designed for intermediate cartridges. The overall design is iconic and widely recognized in both military and urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, front sight post, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear sight, and the slim profile of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, trigger, magazine release, and the overall structure of the rifle.
